name: saddlerag
description: SaddleRAG documentation RAG — query indexed library/API docs and manage scrapes. Bridges to the local SaddleRAG MCP server at http://localhost:6100/mcp.
long_description: Exposes the local SaddleRAG MCP server (http://localhost:6100/mcp) to Claude Desktop via the mcp-remote stdio bridge, so the tools, the SaddleRAG-first instructions, and the scrape/recon/maintain prompts are available. This is the durable path for the newer Claude Desktop build, which does not persist externally-written claude_desktop_config.json mcpServers entries and whose custom-connector UI requires HTTPS (incompatible with a local HTTP server). The version field is overwritten at pack time by scripts/pack-desktop-extension.ps1.
